channel.title: Outdoor Adventures BC — Kelowna Fishing Blog
channel.description: Fishing guides, reports and tips from a working Kelowna charter captain.

item.title: Kelowna Fishing Report — April 2026
item.description: What's biting on Okanagan, Shuswap and Arrow Lakes this month — depths, lures and conditions.

item.title: Best Time to Fish Okanagan Lake — A Month-by-Month Guide
item.description: A month-by-month guide to fishing Okanagan Lake from a captain who fishes it year-round.

item.title: Kokanee Trolling Setup Guide — Okanagan Lake Specifics
item.description: The downrigger, leader, dodger and hoochie setup we run on Okanagan Lake.

item.title: BC Fishing Licence — The 3-Minute Guide
item.description: Short guide to buying a BC freshwater fishing licence before your Kelowna charter.

item.title: What to Bring on a Kelowna Fishing Charter
item.description: The short packing list for a Kelowna charter. What to bring, what to skip.

item.title: A Kid's First Fishing Trip — How to Set It Up Right
item.description: How to set up a Kelowna charter that kids actually love.
